pdf.head:
<#if .locale == "zh_CN">
<#elseif .locale == "zh_TW">
<#elseif .locale == "ja_JP">
<#elseif .locale == "ko_KR">
<#elseif .locale == "th_TH">
</#if>
Remittance Advice
Date Paid: ${record.trandate}
<#-- Logo with aspect ratio preservation --> <#if subsidiary.logo?has_content> <#if subsidiary.internalid == "6">
<@filecabinet nstype="image" style="width: 60px; height: 60px; object-fit: contain;" src="${subsidiary.logo@url}" />
<#elseif subsidiary.internalid == "9">
<@filecabinet nstype="image" style="width: 100%;height: 100%; width: auto; height: auto; object-fit: contain;" src="${subsidiary.logo@url}" />
<#else>
<@filecabinet nstype="image" style="width: 80px;height: 60px; width: auto; height: auto; object-fit: contain;" src="${subsidiary.logo@url}" />
</#if> <#elseif companyInformation.logoUrl?has_content> <@filecabinet nstype="image" style="width: 100%;height: 100%; !important; max-height: 45px !important; object-fit: contain; margin-top: -15px;" src="${companyInformation.logoUrl}" /> </#if> <#if record.subsidiary.internalid != "6">
</#if> ${record.subsidiary.name?split(":")?last?trim}
${record.subsidiary.address1}
<#if record.subsidiary.address2?has_content>${record.subsidiary.address2}
</#if> ${record.subsidiary.city}, ${record.subsidiary.state} ${record.subsidiary.zip}
<#if record.currency == "US Dollar">Tax ID<#else>ABN: </#if> ${subsidiary.federalidnumber}
of
